title: Japanese-Style Spicy Vegetable Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry dish with a spicy kick, inspired by Japanese and Indian cuisines.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: Extra-firm, drained and cut into small cubes

ingredients.name: Japanese Stir Fry Sauce
ingredients.notes: Available at most Asian grocery stores

instructions: Heat 1 tsp of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the cubed tofu and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced bell peppers and cook for another 3-4 minutes, until tender.
Pour in the Japanese Stir Fry Sauce and Spicy Sauce, and stir to coat the vegetables.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve the stir fry over cooked jasmine rice, garnished with chopped cilantro if desired.
